title: A joint resolution providing for congressional disapproval of the proposed export of certain defense articles to Israel.
crs_summary: This joint resolution prohibits a proposed export of certain firearms, parts, and components to Israel.
bill_text:
[Congressional Bills 119th Congress]
[From the U.S. Government Publishing Office]
[S.J. Res. 41 Introduced in Senate (IS)]

<DOC>

119th CONGRESS
 1st Session
S. J. RES. 41

 Providing for congressional disapproval of the proposed export of 
 certain defense articles to Israel.

_______________________________________________________________________

 IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

 March 27, 2025

 Mr. Sanders introduced the following joint resolution; which was read 
 twice and referred to the Committee on Foreign Relations

_______________________________________________________________________

 JOINT RESOLUTION

 Providing for congressional disapproval of the proposed export of 
 certain defense articles to Israel.

 Resolved by the Senate and House of Representatives of the United 
States of America in Congress assembled, That the following proposed 
export to Israel is prohibited:
 (1) The export of the following firearms, parts, and 
 components controlled under Category I of the United States 
 Munitions List in the amount of $1,000,000 or more and 
 described in Transmittal No. DDTC 23-077, which was submitted 
 to Congress pursuant to section 36(c) of the Arms Export 
 Control Act (22 U.S.C. 2776(c)) and communication of which was 
 published in the Congressional Record on March 24, 2025 
 (Executive Communication 510): 20,000 Colt Carbine, 11.5'' 
 barrel length, 5.56mm caliber fully automatic carbine rifles to 
 M.R.D. Efram Investments Ltd in Israel for ultimate end use by 
 the Israel National Police.
 <all>
